name: Raven's Carnage
short_description: Survive endless rounds of monsters while trying to collect the 6 Primordial Powers to prevent the destruction of our Universe. Explore forgotten places, obtain new powers, take advantage of a huge arsenal of upgrades and weapons, and stay alive to defeat the monsters in this Roguelike Bullet-Hell.
detailed_description:
DON'T LET HELL CONSUME OUR UNIVERSE!

Trying to control unknow supernatural forces, Dr.Ashford newest invention ends by trapping his daugther Sarah, and using her as a Human Katalysator to bring hell on Earth. 

When an ancient evil threatens the orderly chaos of the universe, Dr.Ashford hires someone to fight against the endless horde of demons: Raven.

With a little help from Dr. Ashford and some strange allies, Raven now needs to Reproduce and Capture 6 Elemental Powers: Light, Fire, Shadow, Uranium, Ice and Eletricity in order to reopen the portal and save Sarah. (and of course, the universe!)

ENDLESS CARNAGE!

The future of the universe is in your hands, so you don't need to play fair:

-> The enemies will get stronger, and so will you. Have fun with ENDLESS UPGRADES. That's right! Any upgrade you make on your character attribute or gun can be re-upgraded endlessly, (of course, if you manage to buy them all)

-> Find random items to increase your strategic chances against enemies!

-> Every map (level) have it's own Main Quest, and each one of them has a Katalysator Elemental Power for you to unlock (and bring it to Dr.Ashford, of course.)

-> Discover Secret Side Quests that rewards you with unique and special weapons, powers, new map areas and much more: Espectral Staffs, Magic Bows, Revolvers forged by demon blood, and much, MUCH MORE!
